actionUnits.condition: EventTrigger (script guid d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) on Building42 has m_Delegates eventID=4 (PointerClick) with a persistent call to MonoBehaviour id 45104959. EventTrigger (MonoBehaviour id 45104963, script guid d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) on Building42 registers eventID=4 (PointerClick) with a persistent call to MonoBehaviour id 45104959. MonoBehaviour id 45104959 uses script guid 10a92b1b4549024468ecbc96831def68, which matches Residential.cs attached to Building42.
